database_schema.summary: Project uses Google Sheets as database via GAS

tables.name: Quizzes
tables.description: Stores quiz metadata and questions JSON

tables.name: Results
tables.description: Stores student submission results with answers

tables.name: Classes
tables.description: [Planned] Stores class information and teacher assignment

tables.name: Students
tables.description: [Planned] Stores student accounts and class mapping

features: AI Tutor - Giải thích đáp án sai
AI Tutor - Gợi ý câu hỏi tương tự
Difficulty Levels (Mức 1/2/3) support in Questions & Word Export
Smart Distractors - AI-generated wrong answers for MCQ/MULTIPLE_SELECT
Auto-Assign Quizzes to Class upon Creation
Public Library Privacy (Hidden assignments for guests)
Custom 'Coming Soon' Modal for locked features
Improved Student Portal UI (Home button, better visibility)

patterns.name: ExplanationContent Pattern
patterns.description: Component riêng để render AI explanation với Markdown + LaTeX support

patterns.name: MathSpan Pattern
patterns.description: Component để render LaTeX math formulas using MathJax

patterns.name: Word Export Handler
patterns.description: Use switch case in docxGenerator to handle specific question types for .docx generation

patterns.name: Fallback isCorrect Calculation
patterns.description: Calculate isCorrect from correctAnswer when old results don't have isCorrect field

patterns.name: resolveCorrectWordIndexes Fallback
patterns.description: 4-level fallback to resolve correctWordIndexes for UNDERLINE: quiz object → correctAnswer parse → snapshot → validationDetails

gotchas.solution: Use dangerouslySetInnerHTML to render HTML content (e.g., question text with tags)

gotchas.issue: AI trả về Markdown headers (###) trong JSON response
gotchas.solution: Strip Markdown headers trong client-side formatting + Cập nhật prompt để AI không dùng

gotchas.issue: Phân số a/b không render đẹp
Line breaks trong AI response bị mất
gotchas.solution: Parse \n thành paragraphs hoặc bullet points thay vì loại bỏ

gotchas.issue: Old results don't have isCorrect field
gotchas.solution: Add fallback calculateIsCorrect function that recalculates from correctAnswer
Check for both correctAnswers and correctAnswer in statisticsUtils

gotchas.issue: TRUE_FALSE items use isCorrect not isTrue
gotchas.solution: Use item.isCorrect when comparing student answers

gotchas.issue: MCQ correctAnswer may be 'B. Answer' or just 'B'
gotchas.solution: Extract first letter when comparing with student answer

gotchas.issue: UNDERLINE snapshots have correctAnswer string but missing correctWordIndexes array
gotchas.solution: Always fallback parse correctAnswer JSON string when correctWordIndexes is empty - apply in both getAnswerStatus and renderDetailedAnswer

gotchas.issue: AI LLM response wrapped in markdown code blocks (```json...```)
gotchas.solution: Use non-greedy regex /```(?:json)?\s*([\s\S]*?)```/ instead of ^/$ anchored regex. Also update system prompt to discourage markdown wrapping
Use resolveCorrectWordIndexes helper with 4-level fallback in all UNDERLINE rendering code

conventions: AI prompts phải có format instructions rõ ràng (không Markdown headers, dùng numbered lists)
Content formatting: MathSpan cho câu hỏi/options, ExplanationContent cho AI explanations
Question types have different correct answer fields: correctAnswer, correctAnswers, items, pairs, blanks
AI service functions should have [ServiceName] debug logging for response troubleshooting
